meaning: adj.象蜡的,蜡色的,苍白的,光滑的,柔软的,<英俚>生气的
examples: It's fillin' out and doesn't look so sharp an' th' waxy color is goin'.
Symptoms can include catatonic stupor and waxy flexibility.
And the waxy oil keeps ears from getting too dry.
Waxy lasts in red and pink and yellow hung from rods, like nautical buoys.
Now, Dr Bodenschatz has discovered, his waxy microplates also fit neatly into that model.
